name: Cookieware [Badware] | Die of Death
description:
Poor Cookieware was gonna overheat in this summer weather since the air conditioning in her bakery wasn't working.. fuck it, she only needs an apron, clothes are optional~

Hey guys! Today I'm bringing you a chubby milf computer gal (gotta get those tags in somehow), I know, super cool! :> I love this woman with all of my heart, I'll make 3 more bots of her if I must..

Sorry I don't make bots too often, I prefer you guys have something good then some slop I cook up in 20 minutes, I've scrapped about 8-ish bots before this trying to make something good.

Do remember that my requests are open on my strawpage in my bio! Will I always do your requests? Ehhh... only if I deem it good. Not to say they're bad, just some I dont wanna do.
creator: CleverLazyness
